mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, product_id, current_price, new_price, reason, attachments, review_status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_quotes (supplier_id, product_id, current_price, new_price, reason, attachments, review_status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{currentPrice, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{newPrice, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_quotes (supplier_id, product_id, current_price, new_price, reason, attachments, review_status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.currentPrice, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.newPrice, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_quotes WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM supplier_quotes WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM supplier_quotes WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
